programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant walks the wing of a bi-plane in flight. We fill a plexiglass basin with water, plums, ribbon and garter snakes, and one big albino snake. To jump a car off a two level parking structure with the furthest distance.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must ride a bull for eight seconds. Each contestant eats poached cow's brain, served cold. To go the furthest distance after being ratcheted up and rope swinging down.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one moving boat to another. Climb into fishing boat tank filled with dead squid and retrieve weights from the bottom. Contestants shimmy out on a flag pole that is approximately 20 feet from the building, free the flag and shimmy back.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players climb out over the skid and underneath the helicopter. Contestants shoot at target, determining the number of boiled pig rectums they will have to eat. The contestant must navigate around the ledge of a tall building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Playmates Super Bowl Special Part 2

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Player climbs out of a blimp and onto a rope ladder. Contestants bob in plexiglass box of waxworms. To drive a car into a roll.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Climb a rope ladder into a helicopter. To eat the blended concoction you are given. To move flags from the first to the last pole.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To run through a vertical obstacle course. Contestants will put their head inside the box with 24 rats. To cross a plank suspend between to speeding semi-trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Celebrity 2. To move flags from one open window across and around the outside of a building. To separate and move white snakes out of a group of green. To escape from a submerged cage and swim to a life ring.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel. Unhatched duck's embryo boiled 30 minutes and then served. Contestants must ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To gather as many flags as possible. To play a game of pool and eat the assigned items. To run across shipping containers planting flags.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one roof to the other roof. To search for and eat coagulated blood balls hidden in earthworms. To escape from a submerged fuselage.

programme.desc: When Monica injures her head and forgets who she is, she helps a hopeless doctor remember his own identity

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Dominic was sent out by Master Mao to find purpose for his life. He finds out that RJ and the others are really Power Rangers and he wants to join them. He now knows that this is his purpose in life.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Jarrod has found the Rhino Nexus. All he needs is the Control Dagger key to tap into the power. Dominic is startled by a dream of Master Mao telling him to protect the Control Dagger as it holds the key to his destiny.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Control Dagger in hand, Dai Shi aims to unlock the Nexus for himself. The Overlords refuse to let such power fall into the hands of the Rangers or Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts were a notorious force in the Beast Wars. The crystal eyes hold the power to bring back these Phantom Beasts. Our heroes must protect these eyes before Dai Shi or the Overlords resurrect such evil beasts.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts have been brought back to life. Dai Shi has them prove their loyalty by capturing the three masters. The Phantom Beasts capture the masters and use the masters to create the Spirit Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts control the masters and call forth the Spirit Rangers. They look and fight exactly like Power Rangers. Our heroes are in for a real fight as they face the spirits of their own masters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Spirit Rangers could be the end of our heroes if something isn't done. RJ takes the risk of destroying his father. Trusting his instincts, he finds that his dad was prepared if this should happen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Rangers get sucked into a cheesy game show about the past season. Camille hosts the game show and a wrong answer could result in being cancelled!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Whiger steals some of Casey's Tiger spirit. Pleased, Dai Shi becomes the Phantom Beast King. He makes Camille a Phantom Beast General. Evil battles it out with the Rangers stronger than ever.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Whiger was only able to steal the Tiger Spirit from Casey, but not destroy Casey. For his failure, Dai Shi strips him of his power and he is to fade away. Casey shows his kindness to Whiger even though they were just battling.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Camille steals a cloning formula from Maryl. The monkeys will duplicate and Camille's plan just might work. Scorch and Snapper plot to ruin her plan. They don't like how Dai Shi favors her.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The day has arrived for the three to get their master stripes. Lily and Theo pass the test to become masters. Casey does not. He wanders off to think about his loss and comes across Jarrod saving Camille from Dai Shi's monsters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Nobody believes him, but Casey knows that Jarrod still lives inside of Dai Shi. He goes off on his own to save Jarrod. In an epic battle between Dai Shi and Casey, Jarrod manages to break free of Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: A new Beast War is about to begin as Dai Shi collects more fear. Dai Shi opens up a vortex and resurrects all his fallen warriors. Greatly outnumbered, the Rangers do their best to battle evil.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: The Venjix Computer Network is attempting to conquer and lay ruin to the entire planet, and the human race has retreated into the environmentally shielded domed city of Corinth to protect itself from destruction.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: As Venjix grows stronger, it becomes clear that the Rangers need more than three operators to defend the city. Summer suggests that Dillon be the new Black Ranger, but with him part-machine and part-human, no one knows what side he's really on.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Dillon goes through a series of tests to see if he even is Ranger material, but the real test comes when he is faced with the choice of seeking out his past or helping the Rangers as promised.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: When Ziggy is charged with finding the new Green Ranger, he finds the perfect candidate in Tenaya 7, until he realizes she's a machine working for Venjix!

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: When Dillon struggles to activate the invincibility mode of his suit, he challenges Dr. K to come out from behind her protective screen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Ziggy's recruitment as Ranger Green is put into question when parts of his shady past are revealed. Should the Rangers work with someone who is hated by all seven of Corinth's cartels?

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Scott is flooded with memories of his brother when he returns to Marcus' crash site. In order to retrieve an over thruster core, the Rangers need the new Megazord configuration.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Mr. & Mrs. Landsdown suddenly reappear in Summer's life, with intent on making their daughter live up to her promise to marry into a wealthy family.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Diamonds and pretty dresses are no longer important to Summer, who finds her true meaning in what she does with the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: All his life, all Flynn ever wanted to do was to help people, but his heroics as the Blue Ranger are cut short when there is a malfunction in his suit.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: While attempting to overcome a power problem with the Rangers' new Zord configuration, Doctor K is haunted by a terrible mistake.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: When Venjix sends an attack bot from Dillon's past to infiltrate the city, Dillon is torn between destroying the bot or finally finding the answers to his past.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: As the Venjix Virus comes closer to taking over Dillon entirely, the other Rangers and Dr. K race to find a way to slow the growth rate of the virus.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Seeking answers to Dillon's past, the Rangers go outside Corinth to a place Dillon thinks he remembers. They are unaware that it's a trap set by Venjix himself.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: The Rangers once again find themselves saved by the Gold and Silver Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: As the Rangers take a more offensive approach against Venjix, the virus traps the citizens of Corinth inside their own dome and proceeds to suck all the air out of the city.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Led Zeppelin - Physical Graffiti: A Classic Album Under Review
programme.desc: This DVD is a documentary film about the build-up, making, release, and - crucially - music contained on this most revered of albums.

programme.title: Elvis: The Early Years Vol. 1

programme.title: Elvis: Part Two
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life of Elvis Presley, from his humble beginnings to his rise to international stardom.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Cream's Disraeli Gears
programme.desc: Cream was rock's first true supergroup, combining the extraordinary talents of Eric Clapton, Ginger Baker and Jack Bruce in a power trio that set the template for hard rock during the 1970s.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Deep Purple's Machine Head
programme.desc: This classic album features the seminal song "Smoke on the Water," which brought worldwide superstardom to Deep Purple, putting them at the peak of hard rock.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Def Leppard's Hysteria
programme.desc: One of the most successful rock bands, Def Leppard was plagued by death and tragedy. The surviving members explain the making of their most successful album as they sort through the original tapes.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Duran Duran's Rio
programme.desc: A look at the behind-the-scenes creation of the iconic Duran Duran album "Rio," released in 1982.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Elton John's Goodbye Yellow Brick Road
programme.desc: This is the story behind one of the most popular double-albums of all time: Elton John's "Goodbye Yellow Brick Road," featuring Candle in the Wind, Bennie and the Jets and the title track.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Elvis Presley's Elvis Presley
programme.desc: This is the story behind Elvis's first album, which features performances from 1955 and 1956, interviews with the King and rare home movies of him at play and work.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Frank Zappa's Apostrophe/Over-Nite Sensation
programme.desc: This behind-the-scenes film tells the story of the recording of Frank Zappa's solo album "Apostrophe (') and the Mothers of Invention's "Over-Nite Sensation.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.title: Wild Austria

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: The team in saves a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose; a visit to the Rescue Centre, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Battling wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring; visiting a rescue centre, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild; an Amazonian duck gets a miraculous operation.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: Macaque Island

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.desc: Tasmanian devils get into food fights with rivals; how dung beetles roll over the competition; wild boars' fierce mating strategies; hyenas' bone-crushing teeth demolish any meal.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/31/01: Derek Jeter delivers one of the most iconic home runs in Yankees' history and earns himself the nickname, "Mr. November" in the Yankees' walk-off win in Game 4 of the 2001 World Series over the Diamondbacks.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/2002: Kenny Lofton hit a walk-off RBI single in the bottom of the 9th inning to help the San Francisco Giants clinch the the 2002 National League Championship in five games against the St. Louis Cardinals.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: The Cardinals found themselves down 3-2 in the 2011 World Series against the Rangers. In Game 6, St. Louis was down to their final out and down two runs. Then, David Freese came to the plate.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/2002: The Angels take down the Giants in Game 3 of the 2002 World Series, as Anaheim combines for a total of 10 runs on 16 hits in a 10-4 victory at Pacific Bell Park in San Francisco.

programme.title: Fenway Park 100 Years
programme.desc: Fenway Park first opened on April 20, 1912 and since then has been known for its unique features and historic moments. Current and former Red Sox players share their experiences playing in one of baseball's greatest ballparks.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/14/03: On September 14, 2003 Vladimir Guerrero crushes a two-run home run to complete the cycle against Tom Glavine and the Mets.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Hay tensión en la casa, Adela está de malas con Elettra que no entiende cual es el problema, pero el problema es que ella se está ligando a Isaac adelante e Adela y a este parece no importarle.Victor y Potro se dicen sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Karime y Elettra arman un plan para ligarse a Ferre y a Isaac delante de Adela y Eva porque no les gusta su actitud irrespetuosa, estas dos están un poco sorprendidas por lo que pasa y no saben bien como enfrentarlo.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones van a tope para todos menos para Eva que parece no disfrutar lo que está viviendo, ni la llegada de su amigo Pietro logra sacarle el mood negativo a la francesa de fuego. Al mismo tiempo la casa está en shock por un chisme.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shore llegan a Roma. Hay discusiones por ver quién se queda con quién en el hotel. Potro está molesto porque Karime y Elettra se quedan con Víctor y se roban el cuarto del amor. Toda la belleza romana invadida porn los shores que cantan.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mucha tensión en las mini vacaciones en Roma, Potro parece alejarse definitivamente de Karime y gasta una broma al grupo muy pesada. Danik y Elettra finalmente chocan en una pelea dura que divide a la casa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: El clima enrarecido cambia una vez más con la llegada de Tadeo a la costa adriátrica, es que Ursulo media muy bien entre todos y de a poco se gana al grupo y lo une, además se gana el corazón de Elettra que muere por él.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La familia vive un viaje a Venecia a tope, junto con Tadeo y Paula la nueva integrante de la familia. Por la noche en Venecia, algo pasa en la habitación de las chicas que traerá cola y que nadie puede terminar de confirmar muy bien

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Una verdadera guerra se desata en la casa desde la llegada de Paula.Parece no tener límite. Luego de que el chisme del que habla toda la casa salió a la luz, Paula pelea muy fuerte con Isaac y todo el mundo reacciona empeorando el descontrol.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones se van terminando y a la vez está a tope. Los chicos están con el nivel de desmadre al 100. Ligues, body shots, guerra de pizza, fiestas desmadrosas y bromas pesadas. Todo esto no hace olvidar que Aranxta se va.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches children dancers perform and musicians play. King Friday sincerely apologizes to Hula Mouse for his previous behavior. Lady Elaine presents an exhibit of round things. Mr. McFeely shows a film on how marbles are made.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about curiosity. He uses a frame to look closely at different parts of a large mural, and the vegetables in the piece remind him of his trip to "The Edible Schoolyard" in Berkeley, California, where children garden.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Negri's Music Shop where musicians are playing different homemade instruments. Mr. McFeely brings a video showing how people make ice cream cones.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Wonder what it's like to go up in a bucket lift? Mister Rogers rides 60 feet up in the air in one and then comes back down. Mr. McFeely has a video about how people make ice cream.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about the graceful nature of the fish. He visits a ballet studio where he watches a performance. Lady Elaine wants H.J. Elephant to be on her first program, but H.J. is hesitant since he cannot read very well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: What's in Mister Rogers' box? There are words for people who know how to read words, pictures for people who know how to read pictures and a toy truck! Mister Rogers shows a video with different big trucks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a small potted oak tree he is looking after for Mr. McFeely. Prince Tuesday is unhappy with his drawing of the Eiffel Tower. Mayor Maggie compliments Prince Tuesday and gives it to a very pleased Grandpere.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bag of sand, which he takes to the back yard, where he adds it to his sand table. Lady Elaine Fairchilde is not impressed with the art creations made by the others and appoints herself judge of the festival.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pretzel factory to see how people make pretzels. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday and Queen Sara have an argument, which worries Prince Tuesday. He runs away to the home of his friend Daniel Tiger.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes on an airplane and visits with the pilot and flight attendant, who show him around the plane to help children feel more familiar when traveling by air.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a ventriloquist's dummy he played with as a child. Bob Dog falls and is hurt. They take him to the hospital. King, Friday, prohibits play. Mister Rogers says play is important in learning to manage feelings.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: When King Friday outlaws play, Lady Elaine moves her Museum Go-Round to an entirely new location. She finds herself in a place where play is welcome—a play park, where she meets Barbara Russell.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor acude a los expertos del empeño para mostrarles un artículo utilizado en la película "Volver al futuro II". Rick se siente pasado de moda cuando llega a él un extraño calendario de 1900 de una empresa de químicos.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick va a Washington D. C. a ver uno de los primeros Jeep, el cual fue fabricado para la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Aprovechando que está en D. C., visita una librería de tomos antiguos para ver un libro de alquimia.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Este episodio de "El precio de la historia" levanta vuelo con una edición original de 1911 de la novela "Peter Pan": ¿la adquirirá Rick o preferirá gastarse sus recursos en un pedazo de metal de una aeronave?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick negocia el precio de unos anillos de cuando los 49ers de San Francisco ganaron el Super Bowl. ¿Podrá lograr una buena jugada? Corey y Rick ponen a prueba un fusil de pesca: ¿descubrirán aguas turbias en las características de este artículo?

programme.title: Las esposas reales de Windsor: Un compromiso real
programme.desc: La elección de una chica adecuada de la dinastía Windsor ha cambiado con el tiempo. Evolucionó de aristócrata a plebeya y ahora, extranjera, pero el trayecto de cada novia hasta el altar nunca ha sido sencillo.

programme.title: Las esposas reales de Windsor
programme.desc: La boda de cuento de hadas terminó, pero ahora comienza el verdadero trabajo de ser una esposa de la realeza. Desde producir bebés a apoyar buenas causas, la lista de tareas reales es infinita.

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo
programme.desc: El 31 de agosto de 1997, la princesa Diana muere en un trágico accidente de auto. La serie revela los preparativos y las negociaciones que se llevaron a cabo mientras la monarquía y sus asesores luchaban por proteger a los príncipes William y Harry.

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo
programme.desc: La parte final se centra en los planes logísticos para el funeral de Diana y en el propio día de la mudanza, así como en entrevistas muy reveladoras con el mayordomo de Diana durante diez años, Paul Burrell, y su secretario privado, Patrick Jephson.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick mataría por tener un sombrero y una pistola que pertenecían a uno de los hombres de los que se sospechaba que era Jack el Destripador. Corey trabaja horas extra para adquirir un reloj de 1920.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor acude a los expertos del empeño para mostrarles un artículo utilizado en la película "Volver al futuro II". Rick se siente pasado de moda cuando llega a él un extraño calendario de 1900 de una empresa de químicos.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick va a Washington D. C. a ver uno de los primeros Jeep, el cual fue fabricado para la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Aprovechando que está en D. C., visita una librería de tomos antiguos para ver un libro de alquimia.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Este episodio de "El precio de la historia" levanta vuelo con una edición original de 1911 de la novela "Peter Pan": ¿la adquirirá Rick o preferirá gastarse sus recursos en un pedazo de metal de una aeronave?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick negocia el precio de unos anillos de cuando los 49ers de San Francisco ganaron el Super Bowl. ¿Podrá lograr una buena jugada? Corey y Rick ponen a prueba un fusil de pesca: ¿descubrirán aguas turbias en las características de este artículo?

programme.title: Las esposas reales de Windsor: Un compromiso real
programme.desc: La elección de una chica adecuada de la dinastía Windsor ha cambiado con el tiempo. Evolucionó de aristócrata a plebeya y ahora, extranjera, pero el trayecto de cada novia hasta el altar nunca ha sido sencillo.

programme.title: Las esposas reales de Windsor
programme.desc: La boda de cuento de hadas terminó, pero ahora comienza el verdadero trabajo de ser una esposa de la realeza. Desde producir bebés a apoyar buenas causas, la lista de tareas reales es infinita.

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo
programme.desc: El 31 de agosto de 1997, la princesa Diana muere en un trágico accidente de auto. La serie revela los preparativos y las negociaciones que se llevaron a cabo mientras la monarquía y sus asesores luchaban por proteger a los príncipes William y Harry.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley's first love, Chris, abandoned her and their son, choosing her estranged sister instead. She accuses him of neglect and abuse. Steve aims to uncover the truth about Chris as a father and a person.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lorie gave birth to twin boys, and while she initially thought boyfriend Carlos was the father, she would later believe it was actually Warren, a claim he strongly denies. Warren wants Lorie to stop harassing him about being the father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rachel wants to know whether her boyfriend is too good to be true. Letisse says her cab-driving boyfriend drove another woman around town for 10 hours.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Cindy feels no love at all for her sister, Morgan. She will tell her today that she is stealing Morgan's man for good! Next Emario wants to marry Kathryn, but first she needs to come clean and reveal her secret profession as a prostitute!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The show continues with more past guests returning to add to the mayhem!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Psychic Lover" is a phony psychic who convinces women that their boyfriends are cheating so that he can then start having affairs with them. Later Marcus cheated on his girlfriend, Latoria, with her mother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Willy used to be a cheating dog, but now his girlfriend has turned the tables on him. Next Scott and his wife used to have threesomes with Scott's best friend, Junior. But then Karen left her husband to be with Junior.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Scott has 2 girlfriends, but has no idea that both of them are here today to propose to him! Next Amanda wants her boyfriend back. Later Henry is going to tell his girlfriend, Ebony, that he's been cheating with a man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jackie is here to confront her sister, Rachael, for stealing her husband! Next Rich says that he has no problem with the fact that his ex-girlfriend, Jamie, is bi-sexual. He just doesn't like her choice in female mates.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Fred deceived his lover Jay, so now Jay wants his just desserts! Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda is about to drive his girlfriend away! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Regina tells her daughter, Angela, that she is getting married to her ex-boyfriend! Next Suzanne is tired of her boyfriend complaining about her job as an exotic entertainer. Then Tanya is here to tell Bryan's wife about their affair.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tara tells her sister that she's sleeping with her boyfriend and he's been paying her! Next Christina says she loves Mitchell, but he hasn't been treating her right. Then Carla's husband wanted her out of his life so he set her up with his cousin!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lanita's sister, Latoya, has been sleeping with her boyfriend, Mike! But the betrayal deepens and both sisters are in for a surprise. Next Jeny separated from her husband but they have still been sleeping together and now she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Emotional Jamie is torn between her husband and her live-in boyfriend. She says she loves them both and is not even sure whose baby she is carrying! Next Dana and Steve are here to convince their daughter that she cannot marry her cousin!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Es la batalla de los ex! Tony lucha para recuperar a su ex-amante. Richard le cuenta a su esposa que ha tenido un romance y ve a Lisa, su ex-amante, luchar por recuperarlo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En el Show de Jerry Springer de hoy, una batalla de novias. Nicole le da un ultimátum a su amante: o la dejas o me pierdes. ¡Jerry ve cómo saltan chispas en el programa de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Je'nier tiene un secreto difícil de contar a Preston. Después, ¡son Nikki y Nikky las que persiguen al mismo hombre! ¿Ganará Nikki o Nikky el corazón de Kevin? ¿Kevin merece el amor de alguna de las dos mujeres?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario trata de sacarle la verdad a Eva pero ella no se deja Rosaura le cuenta a Claudia la cena que tuvo con Silvano. Por el escándalo llegan Silvia y Maximiliano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: María Julia se queja de la suerte de Karina, despues Rosaura y Silvano la calman. Luis Mario le cuenta toda su historia a Maribella. Ella le da su apoyo. Panchita recibe una llamada de Patricio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le pide a Rosaura que sea de a él por una sola noche para que le devuelva todo. Luis Mario le exige a Eva que le diga donde está el niño para hacerle la prueba. Carlos amenaza a Bruno.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura acepta la proposición de Patricio. Maribella se está haciendo una sesión de fotos. Maribella le dice a la ayudante que está enamorada de Luis Mario y que va a tener que hacer una trampa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio quiere tener relaciones con Rosaura pero ella comienza a llorar y entonces él le dice que se vaya, que no puede hacerlo así. En ese momento comienza a llamar por la puerta Silvano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le cuenta a Eduarda y a Valeria que no necesita a su hijo porque es un fastidio. Cuando llama Luis Mario para decirle que se va a divorciar, Eva se pone como loca, pidiéndole que no la deje.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano y Rosaura se despiden con un beso mientras bailan felices. Maribella le confiesa a Gabriel que sus tiempos de modelo famosa ya están pasando junto con sus años.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio, cuando se queda solo con Rosaura, la abraza y trata de explicarle sus razones por haberla secuestrado, por ella no enamorarse de él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luisana corre a casa de Luis Mario para hacerle saber lo que le dijo Claudia, que la hija que está esperando Rosaura es también su hija. Luis Mario decide ir a hablar con Rosaura a la hacienda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La señora, a quien Rosaura le dejara su hija, llega a su casa muy asustada, para encontrarse con su hija Sonia, quien al reconocer a la niña ve que ahora tiene muchos dólares.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marbella está completamente desesperada ya que acaba de despertar y se da cuenta que ha quedado ciega. Luis Mario, junto a Gabriel y Guillermo, tratan de calmarla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva está esperando a Marybella y la toma por un brazo. Silvano trata de seducir a Rosaura pero ella no se deja y ya se quiere ir. Eva trata de intimidar y asustar a Marybella pero ella no se deja.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario trata de sacarle la verdad a Eva pero ella no se deja Rosaura le cuenta a Claudia la cena que tuvo con Silvano. Por el escándalo llegan Silvia y Maximiliano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A fierce argument over where Nami’s loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing’s for sure – no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker’s younger days.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nojiko continues the story of Nami’s younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami’s treasure, but who’s he working for? More importantly, who’s Nami working for, and what’s she gonna do with her booty?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Something about Nami’s former prison gives Luffy an added burst of strength. He’s so moved by her terrible past that he vows to destroy all of Arlong Park!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally, the day has arrived where Luffy’s face is on an authentic wanted poster! Now there are enemies in hot pursuit as the crew makes waves for Logue Town – the final resting place of Gold Roger!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: A special crystal allows Jack the Ripper to travel through time and continue his killing spree.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man and Black Knight join forces to stop the murders of government-protected witnesses.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man must prevent Keyes from winning a run for Mayor.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: With all the chaos around them, the Sanctuary team must come to terms with how to rebuild after the Cabal's attacks.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A superhero is trapped by Magnus, and his lack of finesse affects the team's work. Elsewhere, Will and Declan go on the search for a creature that's loose in the city, after the discovery of an eggshell.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A confused Dr. Magnus finds the Sanctuary and the surrounding city has been destroyed, but she has no idea how it happened.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Henry tries to determine why a seemingly docile domesticated abnormal suddenly turned violent after it attacks a research scientist.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will tries to defend Magnus from the heads of the Sanctuary Network when they accuse her of committing a shocking murder.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While carrying an abnormal, Will and Magnus' helicopter crashes on a decommissioned oil rig.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: William Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Agent Sandoval (Von Flores) defend the Taelon scientist Rho-ha (Kari Matchett), who is ordered to stand trial for murder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons introduce interdimensional travel to human customers for the sinister purpose of harvesting them for genetic experiments.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An alien probe unleashes a devastating virus on Earth, threatening to kill both the human and Taelon races.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance races against time to infiltrate a remote Taelon lab to destroy the alien probe which holds the liberation movement's secrets. Vint Cerf, “Father of the Internet”, makes a special guest star appearance.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is kidnapped by Nietscheans and forced to play mind games for the amusement of his captors.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer crisscrosses the Midwest leaving a string of victims along the interstate, but when he realizes investigators are hot on his trail the murderer suddenly changes his mark.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer conceals his victims' bodies with trash, discarding them like garbage in the back alleyways of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A Houston killer taunts the media and authorities as he uses homemade ligatures to murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: El Paso investigators race to track down a ruthless killer who is burying his victims in shallow desert graves, dead or alive.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chaos descends on Phoenix as two serial killers compete for the media's attention and the bodies pile up faster than the police can investigate.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Investigators in East Baton Rouge, La., hunt for a serial murderer who carefully carves up and cuts the bodies of his victims after death.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When multiple victims' bodies are dumped around Louisiana's bayou area, a task force is formed to catch a killer who police believe may have strangled over 20 men.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Stef and Nick are prepared to take on a major restoration project and get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: House hunter couple Brenda Barry and Thomas Collins are looking for Maggie and Kieran's help finding a bargain in Tipperary.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives
programme.desc: As a child, Tommy Jarvis did what many others died trying to do. He killed Jason Vorhees, the mass murderer who terrorized the residents of Crystal Lake. But now, years later, Tommy is tormented by the fear that maybe Jason isn’t really dead.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part VII: The New Blood
programme.desc: Ever since homicidal maniac Jason Voorhees got trapped in chains at the bottom of Crystal Lake, the nearby summer camp has operated without a hitch... without a murder. But one of this season’s happy campers has brought along a deadly secret.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
programme.desc: The Big Apple’s in big trouble, as indestructible psycho-fiend Jason Voorhees hits the road to New York City - and paints the town “red.”

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Camp Crystal Lake has been shuttered for over 20 years due to several vicious and unsolved murders. The camp's new owner and seven young counselors are readying the property for re-opening despite warnings of a "death curse" by local residents.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part II
programme.desc: Five years after the bloodbath at Camp Crystal, all that remains is the legend of Jason and his demented mother, who had murdered seven camp counselors. At a nearby summer camp, the new counselors are unconcerned about the warnings to stay away.

programme.title: Friday the 13th - Part III
programme.desc: Ignoring Camp Crystal Lake’s bloody legacy, one by one they fall victim to the maniacal Jason who stalks them at every turn...

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: I See You
programme.desc: Helen Hunt stars in the mind-twisting psychological thriller. The lead investigator on a missing persons case struggles to balance work and home life. But when the family is put in mortal danger, an evil truth about their home is finally uncovered.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: AMISTAD is about a 1839 mutiny onboard a slave ship that is traveling towards the Northeast Coast of America. Much of the story involves a court-room drama about the slave who led the revolt.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Airline pilot Whip Whitaker miraculously lands his plane after a mid-air catastrophe but questions arise as to who or what was really at fault.

programme.title: Much Ado About Nothing
programme.desc: Adapted from William Shakespeare, the film tells the story of two couples, confirmed bachelor Benedick and caustic Beatrice, and young Claudio and innocent Hero. Playful bickering defines one couple, whereas romance and betrayal describe the other.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Xavier Quinn is the police chief of a tiny Caribbean island. He is on good terms with all. When a prominent businessman is murdered, Quinn, like everyone else, believes that the killer is Maubee--a local folk hero and Quinn's childhood friend.

programme.title: Devil in a Blue Dress
programme.desc: Denzel Washington turns up the heat as a L.A. private eye in this steamy mystery from executive producers Jonathan Demme and Edward Saxon and director Carl Franklin. Washington stars as Ezekiel "Easy" Rawlins. Rated: R

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: Police fear the worst when a model daughter disappears in Virginia.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck Southern gentleman turns into a murderous monster.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: One crazy night turns a couple's dream life into a perfect nightmare.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: Fear spreads through a small Kentucky town after a family is murdered

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: Police race against the clock to prevent a killer from striking again.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: When an elderly Vietnam vet is stabbed to death, Seattle detectives expose a crime ring led by a Gypsy con woman and killer. Finally she's exposed for defrauding millions from her victims and murdering those who've stood in her way.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: When Michigan police find a man's headless body, it launches an investigation with countless twists and turns. And when one of the teen killers confesses, saying his friend was the mastermind behind the stabbing, can his word be trusted?

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: Chris Hansen interviews a convicted killer in order to understand why he and his brother kidnapped an elderly Texas woman, drove around and showed her off as their "prize" before assaulting her and tossing her into a river where she drowned to death.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: We revisit with two of our subjects to see how they've been doing since we first profiled them.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Tammi, 45, is an alcoholic despite being raised in an upper middle-class family that provided her with a good education and even golf and tennis lessons.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: A high achiever as a young man, Mike developed a life-threatening dependency on speed balling, which involves mixing cocaine and heroin.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Tim was an accomplished producer and a talented musician with a lucrative career in the entertainment industry, but a crack addiction nearly destroyed everything he treasures.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: When Sheila Davalloo becomes the 'odd woman out' in a love triangle, she kills her rival. The case remains a mystery for months until Sheila tries killing her husband and a dedicated detective finally puts the pieces together of this sordid story.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: They were once best buddies in a small Wyoming town. But after Bob Duke's wife and young son die in a tragic fall, it changes this friendship forever, exposing Bob as the killer and Roger as the one to finally expose the horrific truth.

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans
programme.desc: Allied convoys resupplying the Soviet Union had to navigate the Arctic, infested with U-boats and enemy aircraft.

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans
programme.desc: On D-Day and later in June 1944, the USS TEXAS was called on to silence the heavily fortified battery of massive German naval guns defending the landing beaches and the port city of Cherbourg.

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans
programme.desc: In May 1905, after a year of stalemate in the Russo-Japanese War, Russia's Pacific squadron arrived at the Tsushima Strait.

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans
programme.desc: On July 3, 1940, the British fleet attacked the French navy at Mers el-Kébir, Algeria. In ten minutes, Bretagne sank, Mogador was destroyed, and Provence and Dunkerque were grounded.

programme.title: Hitler's Eastern Front
programme.desc: As Adolph Hitler prepared his armies for the invasion of Russia in 1941, he was conscious that he was about to change European history.

programme.title: Hitler's Eastern Front
programme.desc: The Wehrmacht organized into 3 army groups for operation. North headed to Stalingrad, South, toward Ukraine, and centre towards the heartland of Russia.

programme.title: Hitler's Eastern Front
programme.desc: As Europe staggered toward war, Stalin saw opportunity to gain territory for Russia and stand apart from imperialist conflict between Britain, France, and Germany.

programme.title: Hitler's Fatal Mistake: The Fall of the Third Reich
programme.desc: With the declaration of war on September 3rd, the fight would be long and bitter, and Hitler’s decision to destroy his non aggression pact with Stalin was a fatal mistake that would cost him dearly.

programme.title: Architects of Darkness
programme.desc: The drug addicted dilettante who created the Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Architects of Darkness
programme.desc: Hitler’s Architect – The man who designed the Nuremberg Rallies and headed up the slave labor organization which created the V1 and V2 rockets. Speer was consigned to life imprisonment for his crimes.

programme.title: Architects of Darkness
programme.desc: A journey into his world. The film explores the roots of Adolf Hitler and traces the story of his life from the town of his birth to his final days in a Berlin bunker.

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio llega a su casa gracias al aventón de Juana. Mauricio decide darle a Juana la oportunidad de trabajar en la revista y la muchacha agradece la decisión con un efusivo abrazo. Carlota sorprende a su esposo abrazado a la fotógrafa.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Carlota encuentra a Mauricio y a Juana dándose un abrazo en la puerta de su casa y se pone furiosa. Ana María habla con Juana acerca de lo que es el amor y lo que significa estar enamorada.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio ahogado por una gran tensión decide salir de la oficina y al toparse con Juana se sorprende. Juana al notar la sorpresa en Mauricio le pregunta si acaso no recuerda que ella asistía a su primer día de trabajo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa Luján es una joven madre, valiente y emprendedora. Víctor la enamora y la deja sola con su hijo Lalo. Con mucho esfuerzo sale adelante como administradora de un pequeño hotel en Michoacán, hasta que regresa Miguelito, el narco del pueblo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: La violencia se adueña de Michoacán y Marisa se ve obligada a huir con su hijo. Lalo quiere que se case con Víctor para tener estatus legal en EE. UU., pero Marisa sabe que el amor no se compra. En Nueva York, Cristóbal intenta desenmascarar a Ronnie.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal consigue la prueba que buscaba en la construcción, pero se lo llevan preso. Marisa no quiere perder más tiempo y se va con Lalo a Nueva York en busca del sueño americano. En la gran manzana, se dan cuenta que su hijo es un niño especial.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal Parker resulta ser un acucioso empresario que le gusta indagar en sus negocios. Marisa está casi en la quiebra, hasta que se convierte en una empleada en Manhattan. Por un accidente del destino y una confusión, conoce al príncipe de sus sueños.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Iris le ofrece a Griselda convertirla en una mujer refinada, pero ella la rechaza al descubrir que es tía de su rival. Teresa Cristina se desmaya cuando ve por televisión la noticia del premio. Bárbara planea tomar parte de la fortuna de Griselda.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo y Gabriel invitan a cenar a Griselda al mismo tiempo. Ella acepta ir al Gourmet Palmer con los dos. Amalia la ayuda a vestirse y a maquillarse y Griselda luce radiante. Juan Pablo y Esther vuelven a discutir sobre el embarazo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina llega al Gourmet Palmer y enfrenta a Griselda, quien esta vez se defiende y se va con la frente en alto. Reinaldo está dolido y decepcionado por la actitud de su esposa, discuten y le pide a Teresa Cristina que se separen.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Bárbara se aparece en casa de Griselda y exige ver a su hijo Kikito. Griselda la echa, pero en aras de la tranquilidad familiar, le pregunta cuánto dinero quiere para dejar a su nieto en paz. Juan Pablo despierta junto a Marcela y se marcha afectado.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio se sorprende cuando David le dice molesto que es obvio que “Sol” está enamorada de él y que no permitirá que Mauricio le haga daño. Mauricio recibe el retrato hablado de Juana Pérez de parte del detective privado.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Millions of years ago the Red Planet had a lot in common with Earth, but it's now a desert wasteland. Do the doorways recently discovered on the planet's surface lead to an existential lesson for our species?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: According to physics, time travel is possible. So could it be that UAPs aren't coming from somewhere else, but from some when else. Could these UAPs be us, from the future?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Certain structures on our planet have stood the test of time and continue to astonish mankind. So much so, that alien intervention in their construction thousands of years ago, has yet to be ruled out.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: In July of 2023, David Grusch, a former high ranking US Intelligence officer testified to a US government Oversight Committee that there are alien spacecraft located at secret facilities in the US.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Some places in the world, record more UAP sightings than the rest. So many so, in fact, that people flock from all over the world just for the chance to glimpse a flying saucer.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: UAPs have only recently been witnessed entering the ocean at very high speeds. And since our oceans can be as much as six miles deep, is it possible that some of these UAPs were simply trying to get home?

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On January 28, 1994, an Air France pilot, his crew and passengers witnessed a brightly-glowing red and brown disc-shaped object while flying to London.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: There are approximately 30,000 commercial flights in the United States every day, and as the number of flights increase, so does the proximity of UFO encounters.

programme.title: UFO Hunters

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On October 26, 1994, the U.S. government made their first official acknowledgement of Area 51.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
